name: pranan-companion
description: Pranan Companion - AI-powered relationship intelligence for your communication tools

scripts.release:zip: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../pranan-companion-v$(node -p "require("../package.json").version").zip .
scripts.build:staging: VITE_API_HOST="${VITE_API_HOST:?Set VITE_API_HOST=https://...your-staging-or-preview-url}" npm run build && node scripts/build-manifest.mjs
scripts.prepublish:check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
